feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integration of Work instructions from S4-Public to SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi, we were able to import work instructions from ERP to SAP Digital Manufacturing (DM) as PRT-type documents in on-premise environments. However, we couldn't find this option in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Is there a way to include work instructions in S/4HANA Public Cloud and send them to SAP DM? 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: refresh the system with Data and take the Configuration
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

for Quality Environment, can the Client refresh the S4HANA Public System so that they can clear all the data loaded and just keep the configuration??

Thanks,

TQM

entry.title: SAP BTP React app - CSRF token validation failed - during POST to Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm a little but stuck. Hope you can help, here is the case:

I'm currently working on a application which fetches data from the backend, and posts new entries to custom business object using API calls. 

I've wrote the application in React, using SAP BAS to deploy it to SAP BTP on CF. 

I use the xsuaa service, bind it to my app, and have login feature to start the application.

I use a destination service and connect it through the destination to S4Hana Public Cloud with the comm user (yes, I tried oauth2samlbearer but somehow I can't get it to work (anyone got a guide? 😉 ) ). It is bound to the service.

When I fetch data, all works fine, it fetches process order information.

I do some stuff with the orders, and the results should be send to S4Hana Public cloud, to a business object which is exposed. 

So I fetch the X-CSRF-Token (is getting fetched), pass this to the post including payload, and.....it fails with the 403 error that my csrf token validation failed. 

The things I checked already:

The authentication is always set to true, so the cookie handling should be done by the browser:

const getAxiosConfig = () => { return { withCredentials: true, }; };

When I try to do this manually (getting the cookies and combining them), the cookies are not exposed do to security reason. Pretty sure it is not advised to do so btw

export const createProcessOrderSet = async (payload) => {
  const local = "/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROCESSORDERS_CDS/YY1_PROCESSORDERS";
  const destination = "/destination/S4H_BACKEND/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROCESSORDERS_CDS/YY1_PROCESSORDERS";
  const url = process.env.NODE_ENV === "production" ? destination : local;
  const config = { withCredentials: true };

  // Log URL for debugging
  console.log("Using URL:", url);

  try {
    // Fetch CSRF token via GET request
    const csrfResponse = await axios.get(`${url}?$top=1`, {
      ...config,
      headers: {
        "X-CSRF-Token": "Fetch",
        Accept: "application/json",
      },
    });

    // Retrieve CSRF token using both lower and proper case header names
    const csrfToken = csrfResponse.headers["x-csrf-token"] || csrfResponse.headers["X-Csrf-Token"];
    if (!csrfToken) {
      throw new Error("CSRF Token not received from SAP");
    }
    console.log("CSRF Token:", csrfToken);

    // Rely on the browser's cookie management (withCredentials) for session cookies
    // No manual Cookie header is set here.

    // Perform the POST request using the CSRF token
    const postResponse = await axios.post(url, payload, {
      ...config,
      headers: {
        "X-CSRF-Token": csrfToken,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "Accept": "application/json",
      },
    });

    return postResponse.data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(" Error creating process order set:", error);
    throw error;
  }
};

When I do all this locally using a proxy in my app, the posting and stuff just works fine. It looks like the destination is the issue I think, but even that is not something unfamiliar. Any hints or tips regarding the destination or the destination services? I searched of course but notes and hints are mostly targeted at onprem/private cloud. The manual cookies didn't work, no authentication didn't work, the only difference is the destination, but the fetch of data (standard api's) do work, except for the post.

Anything would help 🙂

Cheers!

Laurens

entry.title: How to change end date of a work agreement during transfer situation in manage workforce
entry.content:
Rehiring does not work as expected and the end date is not changed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The cash flow is not generated automatically
entry.content:
What are the additional settings are required to enable automatic generation of cash flows?

We confirmed that executing the Flow Builder job manually via "Schedule Jobs for Flow Builder" works as expected.
In the Starter System, the cash flow is generated automatically without any issues.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to transport a G/L Account to a PROD Tenant?
entry.content:
How to transport a G/L Account to a PROD Tenant?

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Output multiple instructions all at once (download multiple instructions as a PDF all at once)
entry.content:
Regarding PDF output of manufacturing instructions, is there a way to output them all at once (download multiple instructions as a PDF all at once)?
I understand that  select and output individual instructions in the manufacturing instruction inquiry (CO03).
To output multiple instructions, I need to repeat this process, so I was wondering if it would be possible to output them all at once.I would appreciate it if you could tell me about the relevant application, possible operation plans, past operation examples, etc.

entry.title: Retention Period of PDF Attachments (on Journal Entries and Supplier Invoices)
entry.content:
Hi,

Our client requested some clarity on the default retention policy in S/4 Public Cloud.
Specifically for PDF's that are attached onto Journal Entries and or Supplier Invoices

They want to know if they need to print all documents or if they can leave it within S/4. 
They need to know if the auditors can find back all the attachments within S/4 or if they should look through paperwork.

I looked around, but did not find the requested information. all help is much appreciated!

Thanks in advance
Matthias

entry.title: About scope items for material closing period(MMPV)
entry.content:
Dear [SAP Team/SAP Support],

Which scope item does the material closing period (MMPV) function apply to?
Until version 2402, it was listed in the scope item BEI (period end processing plant),but it seems to have been discontinued when version 2408 was released.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: purchasing view data master data
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

I would know is there any possibility of comparing master data between two company codes as we are using public cloud I am not aware how can it be comparable. kindly suggest me any leads would be appreciated.

scenario :

we have 2 company codes wanted to test the purchasing view for both company codes in materials to compare and harmonize same for both company codes.

entry.title: Universal parallel accounting activation in S/4HANA Cloud, Public edition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can green field customer for S/4HANA Cloud, Public edition select whether they activate Universal parallel accounting or not? Will it be installed as default and cannot deactivate if they use multiple ledgers and accounting principles with additional scope item 1GA or 2VA?

Kind Regards,

Eitaro

entry.title: Project Budget
entry.content:
When maintaining the project budget, I manually uploaded the budget for higher-level WBS elements (parent WBS). However, the system automatically aggregated the budgets of lower-level WBS into the parent WBS, resulting in:

  • Aggregated Costs showing double-counted budget (Parent WBS budget = Manually uploaded value + Sum of child WBS budgets).

  • Non-Aggregated Costs displaying correctly (only the manually uploaded budget).

Requirement: How to prevent the parent WBS budget from being inflated by child WBS aggregation while ensuring accurate budget reporting?

entry.title: In S4 HANA Public Cloud where do I find Configuration for OKYD and OKEQ?
entry.content: I have SAP S4 HANA books about Costing Version and CO Controlling Version 0 having exchange rate type marked but they all refer to t-codes OKYD and OKEQ.  Where do I find this configuration in S4 HANA Public Cloud?

entry.title: Wrong Currency Exchange Rate fetching while post Export Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi Expert

Can anyone help us to fetch foreign currency exchange rate on billing from sales order, because in our case we had create another exchange rate type "B" for Curr. Exch.Rate for Export instead of standard type "M". Now system consider the same rates on sales order based on ex.rate type "B" but not on billing document (VF01) and on billing date system calling exch.rate from "M". Kindly help to resolve this issue on Public Edition.

 

Thanks 

Vinay

entry.title: Create a Custom field in a business context and map data to it from a field in CDS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to create a custom field in the Pricing (SD_PRICECOMHEAD) Business context in public cloud and then to get 'Account group' field data from the CDS view I_CustomerAccountGroup into the new custom field.

Is it possible to create a custom field in a business context and then link it to a Standard field from a CDS view to capture its data.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Issue with Determining Current Day of the Week in CDS View Calculation Field
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In S/4 Hana public cloud system,

In Extensibility (not in BADI):  

In one of our CDS view developments, we needed to determine the current day of the week in numeric format (e.g., Monday = 1, Tuesday = 2, etc.). I checked the available functions in the calculation field but couldn't find any that directly provide this value.

We attempted the following logic, but it doesn't yield accurate results:

 

 
MOD(DATS_DAYS_BETWEEN(CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING($session.system_date, 1, 4), '0101') AS ABAP.DATS), $session.system_date), 7) + 1
Example:  MOD("20240101", $session.system_date), 7) + 1  - Giving the accurate day like Monday as  - 1  
But   MOD("20250101", $session.system_date), 7) + 1 -Giving the wrong day  Monday as  - 6
The above logic i am using the dynamic year.
 
Regards,
A.Saikrishna

entry.title: Issue with Email Notification Link for background job in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
• In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, after configuring the situation template for background job notifications, the email notification is received but the navigation link within the email does not work.
  • Upon clicking the link in the email notification, the error "App could not be opened either due to an incorrect configuration or a missing role assignment" is displayed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Need APIs for Automating Finance Data Uploads (No Manual Entry)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for our client, and the business has a strict requirement for automated data uploads in the Finance module — they do not accept manual entries for the scenarios listed below.

We explored available options like Migration Cockpit, SOAP/REST APIs, and standard CDS views, but we could not identify suitable APIs or methods for the following requirements.

Module Business Requirement Current Situation Our Consulting Concern
FinanceVendor invoice uploadManual entry via FIORINo API found; how to upload invoices automatically when HSN Code is missing?
FinanceCustomer invoice uploadManual entry via FIORIIs there an API or method to upload customer invoices without HSN Code?
FinanceCustomer to Customer transfer postingManualCan this be automated using Migration Cockpit or an API in Public Cloud?
FinanceVendor to Vendor transfer postingManualAny way to automate via standard APIs in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
FinanceGL Account creationManual copyCan GL master data be created via API/Migration Object in Public Cloud?
FinanceDepreciation Key creationManual configHow can we create a new depreciation key (different rate) via automated process or API?
FinanceGL Line Item ChangeManualIs there a way to update GL line items automatically (via API or standard FIORI)?
FinanceDelivery Report UploadNot supportedIs there a way to upload delivery-related reports or data in Public Cloud?

➤ Our Expectations:

  • API endpoints (if available) to handle these operations

  • Workarounds or alternative integration strategies (e.g., iRPA, SAP BTP, Integration Suite)

  • Guidance on best practices for Public Cloud automation (data load without user intervention)

Any documentation, API hub links, or practical insights from similar implementations would be very helpful.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Need APIs for Automating Finance Data Uploads (No Manual Entry)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for our client, and there is a critical business requirement to automate all Finance-related data uploads — manual entry is not acceptable.

We have explored tools like Migration Cockpit, checked standard APIs, and searched the SAP API Business Hub, but we couldn’t identify suitable APIs or automated solutions for the below scenarios:

Module Business Requirement Current Situation Our Consulting Concern
FinanceVendor invoice uploadManual via FioriNo suitable API found – how can we upload invoices when HSN Code is missing?
FinanceCustomer invoice uploadManual via FioriAny API or method for upload without HSN Code?
FinanceCustomer to Customer transfer postingManualCan this be automated using Migration Cockpit or APIs?
FinanceVendor to Vendor transfer postingManualAny way to automate through API or integration tool?
FinanceGL Account creationManual copyIs it possible to create GL accounts using APIs or Migration Cockpit?
FinanceDepreciation Key creationManual configCan we create custom depreciation keys with new rates automatically?
FinanceGL Line Item ChangeManualIs there any standard API or method to update GL line items in Public Cloud?
FinanceDelivery Report UploadNot supportedCan delivery reports or related data be uploaded in Public Cloud? If yes, how?

➤ Our Objective:

To identify SAP-supported APIs or integration methods for handling these activities in fully automated mode (no user interaction). Any insights into:

  • API endpoints

  • iRPA / SAP BTP Integration Suite options

  • Workarounds or standard best practices are appreciated.

We welcome any relevant links, documentation, or expert suggestions.

entry.title: Backflush Components Not Appearing in Pick List Form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I've noticed that components set to backflush are not appearing in the Pick List form.
Is this the expected behavior, or could there be a configuration I'm missing?

Thanks in advance for your insights!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
